verifier.py uses get_slide_count() and checks if count equals 5

pi_items.metadata_value: Data is synthetic (created by agent during task execution)
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh creates a fresh LibreOffice Impress window with new file basic_presentation.odp; file does not pre-exist; content will be created by agent

privileged_info_summary: The task.json for create_basic_presentation@1 contains NO 'metadata' field, contradicting the expected audit structure. However, task parameters are fully verified: task ID matches environment reference 'libreoffice_impress_env@0.1' in env.json, difficulty is 'easy' with timeout of 180 seconds and max 50 steps. The task uses LibreOffice Impress with ODP (OpenDocument Presentation) file format, both real, well-documented standards. The presentation is created at /home/ga/Documents/Presentations/basic_presentation.odp as synthetic data generated during task execution. The verifier implements four criteria correctly: (1) exactly 5 slides required, (2) at least 4/5 slides must have titles, (3) at least 4/5 slides must have 2+ bullet points, (4) at least 4/5 slides must have meaningful content. Pass threshold is 75% (3/4 criteria). All verification utilities (copy_and_parse_presentation, get_slide_count, get_slide_title, get_slide_bullets) are properly implemented using odfpy and python-pptx libraries. The verifier correctly matches the task requirements stated in README.md and setup instructions.
